creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't see this on my instance of poudriere-devel + latest qemu-bsd-user.

There was a sendfile() update to qemu-bsd-user this weekend.  Are you running the latest update to emulators/qemu-static-user in your jail or running my branch at https://github.com/seanbruno/qemu-bsd-user/tree/bsd-user

My build log:

http://chips.ysv.freebsd.org/data/11armv6-default/2014-10-05_21h42m23s/logs/gstreamer-plugins-0.10.36_4,3.log
